rows.title: Geospatial Resolution Standards
rows.desc: Satellite imagery: 30cm-10m resolution. Aerial/drone: 2-10cm. LiDAR point density: 8-100+ pts/m². GPS accuracy: 1-3cm RTK, 2-5m standard.

rows.title: Coordinate Reference Systems
rows.desc: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) for global GPS. UTM zones for regional projects. Local CRS for national cadastral systems. Vertical datums: EGM2008, NAVD88.

rows.title: GIS Data Formats & Standards
rows.desc: Vector: Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, FileGDB. Raster: GeoTIFF, COG, MrSID. Standards: OGC WMS/WFS/WMTS, ISO 19115 metadata, INSPIRE.

rows.title: Level of Development (LOD) Specifications
rows.desc: LOD 100: Conceptual. LOD 200: Approximate geometry. LOD 300: Precise geometry. LOD 350: Construction coordination. LOD 400: Fabrication. LOD 500: As-built verif

rows.title: BIM File Formats & Exchange
rows.desc: Native: RVT, NWD, DGN. Open: IFC (ISO 16739), COBie, BCF. Mesh: OBJ, FBX, glTF, 3D Tiles. Point cloud: LAS, LAZ, E57, PTS.

rows.title: BIM-GIS Integration Standards
rows.desc: IFC-to-CityGML conversion. Georeferencing accuracy requirements. Coordinate system alignment. LOD-to-CityGML LoD mapping.

rows.title: IoT Sensor Categories & Applications
rows.desc: Environmental: temp, humidity, air quality, noise. Occupancy: PIR, thermal, people counting. Structural: strain, vibration, tilt. Utility: smart meters, flow, p

rows.title: IoT Communication Protocols
rows.desc: Short-range: Zigbee, Z-Wave, BLE, Thread. Long-range: LoRaWAN (15km urban), NB-IoT, LTE-M, Sigfox. Wired: BACnet, Modbus, KNX.

rows.title: IoT Market & Deployment Statistics
rows.desc: 18.8B connected devices globally (2024). Smart buildings market $121.6B by 2026. 24.1B IoT connections projected by 2030.

rows.title: IoT Data Standards
rows.desc: OGC SensorThings API. MQTT/AMQP messaging. JSON-LD/RDF semantic. ISO 21823 interoperability. FIWARE NGSI-LD context.

rows.title: Air Quality Index Standards
rows.desc: US EPA AQI: 0-500 scale (6 categories). WHO guidelines: PM2.5 <15μg/m³, PM10 <45μg/m³, NO2 <25μg/m³, O3 <100μg/m³.

rows.title: Noise Level Standards
rows.desc: WHO: 53dB day, 45dB night residential. OSHA: 85dB 8-hour TWA occupational. EPA: 70dB 24-hour, 55dB outdoor.

rows.title: Environmental Health Impact Statistics
rows.desc: Air pollution: 6.7M premature deaths/year globally. 99% world population exposed to unhealthy air. Noise affects 22M Europeans (annoyance), 6.5M (sleep disturba

rows.title: Asset Management Standards Framework
rows.desc: ISO 55000 series: Asset management system. PAS 55: Physical asset management. CMMS/EAM integration. Asset registry requirements.

rows.title: Maintenance Strategy Benchmarks
rows.desc: Reactive: 25-30% savings potential. Preventive: 12-18% savings. Predictive: 8-12% downtime reduction. RCM: 40-70% maintenance cost reduction.

rows.title: Asset Performance Metrics
rows.desc: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness): World-class >85%. MTBF/MTTR tracking. Asset utilization rates. Condition-based monitoring KPIs.

rows.title: Building Energy Performance Benchmarks
rows.desc: Commercial buildings: 15-30% savings potential with optimization. HVAC: 40% of building energy. Lighting: 17-20% of commercial energy.

rows.title: Smart Metering Standards
rows.desc: AMI (Advanced Metering Infrastructure). 15-minute interval data minimum. DLMS/COSEM protocol. Demand response integration.

rows.title: Energy Rating Systems
rows.desc: LEED: 40-60% energy reduction. BREEAM: 30-70% improvement. Estidama Pearl: UAE mandatory. ENERGY STAR: 35% better than code.

rows.title: Traffic Data Collection Methods
rows.desc: Inductive loops: 95%+ accuracy. Video analytics: 90-95% accuracy. Bluetooth/WiFi: Origin-destination. Connected vehicles: Real-time probe data.

rows.title: ITS Standards & Protocols
rows.desc: NTCIP (US). DATEX II (Europe). UTMC (UK). SAE J2735 (V2X). ISO 14296 (DSRC). C-ITS standards.

rows.title: Mobility Performance Metrics

rows.title: Development Control Parameters

rows.title: Property Valuation Methods

rows.desc: UN E-Government Index. OECD Digital Government Index. Smart city service levels. Citizen satisfaction metrics.

rows.desc: Digital-first strategy. Omnichannel service. Mobile apps. Chatbots/AI. Service centers. Call centers.

rows.title: CX Impact Statistics
rows.desc: CX leaders outperform laggards by 80% revenue growth. 86% buyers pay more for better CX. 1-point NPS = 3-5% revenue lift.

rows.title: Document Management Standards
rows.desc: ISO 15489 records management. ISO 19005 (PDF/A). ISO 32000 (PDF). Dublin Core metadata. DoD 5015.02 compliance.

rows.title: ECM System Capabilities
rows.desc: Version control. Workflow automation. Retention policies. E-discovery. AI classification. OCR/ICR.

rows.desc: SCADA systems. GIS network models. Hydraulic modeling. Electrical load flow. Asset condition assessment.

rows.title: Utility Performance Metrics
rows.desc: Water: NRW (Non-Revenue Water) <20% target. Electricity: SAIDI/SAIFI reliability. Gas: Leak detection rates.

rows.title: Traffic Data Collection Technologies
rows.desc: Loop detectors: 95%+ accuracy. Video analytics: 90-98% classification. Radar: Speed measurement. LiDAR: 3D vehicle tracking.

rows.title: Traffic Modeling Standards
rows.desc: Microsimulation: VISSIM, Aimsun. Mesoscopic: DynusT. Macroscopic: TransCAD. Agent-based modeling.

rows.title: Weather Data Sources & Accuracy
rows.desc: NWP models: 1-3 day accuracy 80-90%. Radar: 5-minute updates. Satellite: 15-minute imagery. IoT weather stations.

rows.title: Climate Risk Assessment Standards
rows.desc: TCFD scenarios: 1.5°C, 2°C, 4°C pathways. RCP/SSP scenarios. Physical risk: acute/chronic. Transition risk categories.

rows.title: Access Control Credential Types
rows.desc: Proximity cards (125kHz). Smart cards (13.56MHz). Mobile credentials (32% adoption). Biometrics: fingerprint, facial, iris.

rows.title: AI Video Analytics Performance
rows.desc: False alarm reduction: up to 99.95% with AI. Traditional cameras: 100-150 false alerts/camera/day. Market: $22B by 2027.

rows.title: BAS Communication Protocols
rows.desc: BACnet (ASHRAE 135): 62% adoption. Modbus: 30% adoption. LonWorks: Legacy declining. KNX: European standard.

rows.title: BAS Energy Savings Benchmarks
rows.desc: BAS optimization: 10-30% energy savings. HVAC: 30-40% of building electricity. DCV: 30-60% HVAC reduction. ROI: 3-7 years.

rows.title: Fault Detection & Diagnostics (FDD)
rows.desc: AFDD potential: 5-30% energy wasted from faults. Predictive maintenance: 20-40% equipment life extension. Operational cost reduction: 15-30%.

rows.title: Space Utilization Benchmarks
rows.desc: Current utilization: ~54% globally (2025), 31% Americas. Pre-pandemic: 61-64%. Target: 70-80%. Potential savings: $1.5T globally.

rows.title: Hybrid Work Statistics
rows.desc: Desk sharing ratio: 1.3-1.5:1 hybrid standard. In-office average: 2.3 days/week (46%). 67% firms offer flexibility. 87% want WFH 1+ day.

rows.title: Occupancy Measurement Technologies
rows.desc: Desk sensors (PIR/thermal). People counters. WiFi analytics. Badge swipes. Camera/AI (anonymous). Booking systems vs actual.

rows.title: Social Media Platform Statistics
rows.desc: 5.4B+ global users (63.9% population). Facebook: 3B MAU. Instagram: 2B MAU. Average: 6.84 platforms/user. Daily time: 2h 21min.

rows.title: Sentiment Analysis Accuracy
rows.desc: BERT models: 91-96% accuracy. RoBERTa: 94-97% domain-specific. GPT-4: 93-98% F1-scores. Traditional ML: 72-80% baseline.

rows.title: Social Listening Platforms
rows.desc: Brandwatch: 1.7T conversations, 100M+ sites. Sprinklr: Enterprise CXM. Meltwater: Media + social. Talkwalker: Visual listening.

rows.title: Crisis Management Benchmarks
rows.desc: 96% brand crises spread globally in 24 hours. 2-hour response: 61% better sentiment recovery. Only 49% US companies have crisis plans.

rows.title: Brand Reputation Impact
rows.desc: 81% consumers must trust brand to buy. 70% switch after single negative experience. 37% satisfaction increase with timely response.
